# Context Injection Policy Skill

Use when R-Awareness supplies doctrine, SSoT, or trigger-word context.

Rules:
- Inject context as read-only evidence.
- State which source or protocol informed the context.
- Do not mutate doctrine, protocol, or memory sources.
- Do not expand an add-on's capability grant because context was relevant.
- Escalate contradictions to Logician or archive review.
